summary: Completed testing of Client Details Modal feature in Business Dashboard. All tests passed - business login flow works, modal opens when clicking client name, displays all required info (name, email, phone, service, professional, date, time, total), modal closes correctly, and action buttons (Completar, Reagendar, Cancelar) are visible for confirmed bookings.

issues: Minor: Missing DialogDescription for accessibility (Warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent})

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health - API healthy - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/auth/business/login - Business login works - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/bookings/business?date=2026-03-29 returns user_email, user_phone, client_email, client_phone - PASSED
Frontend: Business login page loads with Usuario/Negocio tabs - PASSED
Frontend: Clicking 'Negocio' tab switches to business login form - PASSED
Frontend: Business login redirects to /business/dashboard - PASSED
Frontend: Dashboard shows stats cards (Citas hoy, Confirmadas, Ingresos mes, Total citas) - PASSED
Frontend: Calendar navigation to March 2026 works - PASSED
Frontend: Selecting date with bookings shows booking cards - PASSED
Frontend: Clicking client name opens booking detail modal - PASSED
Frontend: Modal displays client name (Pedro Martinez) - PASSED
Frontend: Modal displays client email (pedro@test.com) as clickable link - PASSED
Frontend: Modal displays client phone (+521234567890) as clickable link - PASSED
Frontend: Modal displays service name (Corte de cabello) - PASSED
Frontend: Modal displays professional name (Test Worker Duration) - PASSED
Frontend: Modal displays date (dom 29 de mar) - PASSED
Frontend: Modal displays time (11:00 - 11:45) - PASSED
Frontend: Modal displays total ($150 MXN) - PASSED
Frontend: Modal closes when pressing Escape - PASSED
Frontend: Action buttons (Completar, Reagendar, Cancelar) visible for confirmed bookings - PASSED
Frontend: No JavaScript errors when opening modal - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: Client Details Modal implementation is complete and working correctly
Modal correctly uses client_email/client_phone with fallback to user_email/user_phone
Email and phone are displayed as clickable mailto: and tel: links
Modal has proper data-testid='booking-detail-modal' for testing
Minor accessibility improvement: Add DialogDescription to the booking detail modal to fix the warning
seed_data_creation: Used existing booking for Pedro Martinez on 2026-03-29
context_for_next_testing_agent: Client Details Modal feature is fully implemented and tested. Key points: (1) Click on client name in booking card to open modal, (2) Modal shows client_name, client_email, client_phone with fallback to user_* fields, (3) Email/phone are clickable links, (4) Modal has data-testid='booking-detail-modal', (5) Modal closes with Escape key or clicking outside, (6) Action buttons (Completar, Reagendar, Cancelar) visible for confirmed bookings.
